opening_line: I'm stuck in the elevator. It stopped between floors. There's someone on the roof of the cab. I can hear them breathing.
notes_for_player: Elevator CAM — figure on cab roof. Do not restart power without protocol.

questions.label: Ask location
questions.response: Between eleven and twelve. The display is blank.

questions.label: Ask appearance
questions.response: I can't see their face. Just hands on the ceiling panel.

questions.label: Request camera check
questions.response: Check your monitor. Tell me what you see. Tell me I'm wrong.
